recipe.title: Fragrant squash curry
recipe.description: From Jamie’s new book Together, this luxurious veggie curry recipe is a proper treat. Delicious with fluffy coconut rice and fennel naans.

steps.instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/gas 4. Scrub the squash (there’s no need to peel it), carefully halve it lengthways and deseed, then chop into 2cm chunks. Place in a roasting tray, toss with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then roast for 1 hour, or until soft and caramelized.

on_enter.say: Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/gas 4. Scrub the squash (there’s no need to peel it), carefully halve it lengthways and deseed, then chop into 2cm chunks. Place in a roasting tray, toss with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then roast for 1 hour, or until soft and caramelized.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, peel and roughly chop the onion, peel the...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, peel and roughly chop the onion, peel the garlic and ginger, and dry fry in a non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat with the coriander and fenugreek seeds and the curry powder, stirring until lightly charred all over.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, peel and roughly chop the onion, peel the garlic and ginger, and dry fry in a non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat with the coriander and fenugreek seeds and the curry powder, stirring until lightly charred all over.

steps.descr: Add the tomatoes and pineapple rings (reserving the...
steps.instructions: Add the tomatoes and pineapple rings (reserving the juice), and cook for 10 minutes to soften and char, stirring regularly. Tip it all into a blender, add the coconut milk and blitz until very smooth. Return to the pan, tip in the chickpeas, juice and all, and simmer gently until the sauce is thickened.

on_enter.say: Add the tomatoes and pineapple rings (reserving the juice), and cook for 10 minutes to soften and char, stirring regularly. Tip it all into a blender, add the coconut milk and blitz until very smooth. Return to the pan, tip in the chickpeas, juice and all, and simmer gently until the sauce is thickened.

steps.descr: Stir in the roasted squash, then season the curry to...
steps.instructions: Stir in the roasted squash, then season the curry to perfection, tasting and tweaking, and loosening with the reserved pineapple juice.

on_enter.say: Stir in the roasted squash, then season the curry to perfection, tasting and tweaking, and loosening with the reserved pineapple juice.

steps.instructions: Preheat the oven to 150°C/300°F/gas 2. Cover and place the pan in the oven until hot through – about 1 hour. Nice with picked coriander leaves.

on_enter.say: Preheat the oven to 150°C/300°F/gas 2. Cover and place the pan in the oven until hot through – about 1 hour. Nice with picked coriander leaves.
